data.keyword: how to write a cover letter

result.keyword: how to write a cover letter

items.markdown:
![How to Write a Cover Letter (With Examples & Pro Tips)](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210056-2120-0139-0000-96bea291b2de:20)
![How to Write a Cover Letter (With Examples & Tips)](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210056-2120-0139-0000-96bea291b2de:21)
![How to Write a Cover Letter in 2026](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210056-2120-0139-0000-96bea291b2de:22)
![How to Write a Cover Letter (With Examples & Tips)](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210056-2120-0139-0000-96bea291b2de:23)
![Cover Letter Advice & Samples | Yale Law School](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210056-2120-0139-0000-96bea291b2de:24)

A cover letter is a one-page persuasive letter submitted with your resume. `It answers three questions: Who are you? What role are you applying for? And most importantly, how will your specific skills and enthusiasm directly solve the employer's needs?` [](https://www.youthcentral.vic.gov.au/jobs/resumes-and-cover-letters/how-write-cover-letter) [[1]](https://www.youthcentral.vic.gov.au/jobs/resumes-and-cover-letters/how-write-cover-letter)[[2]](https://careerdevelopment.princeton.edu/cover-letter-guide/basic-principles-cover-letter-writing)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U2Lfe5SLPSc&vl=en)

1. Formatting and Structure

Keep your letter to a single page (250–400 words) and format it like a standard professional business letter:[](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-format-a-cover-letter-example) [[1]](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-format-a-cover-letter-example)[[2]](https://www.themuse.com/advice/how-to-write-a-cover-letter-31-tips-you-need-to-know)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jcq8GKQfi8A)[[4]](https://www.livecareer.com/cover-letter/formats)

- **Header:** Include your name, contact info, and the date at the top. (Skip this if filling out an online text box).[](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter) [[1]](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter)[[2]](https://uk.indeed.com/career-advice/cvs-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter)
- **Salutation:** Address the hiring manager or specific department. (e.g., *Dear [Hiring Manager's First & Last Name]* or *Dear [Job Title] Hiring Team*).[](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter) [[1]](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter)[[2]](https://uk.indeed.com/career-advice/cvs-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter)
- **Introduction:** State the job you are applying for and why you are enthusiastic about the role and company.[](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter) [[1]](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U2Lfe5SLPSc&vl=en)
- **Body Paragraph(s):** Focus on 1-2 major achievements from your resume. Do not simply rehash your job history; explain *how* your specific skills can help solve the company's current challenges.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jcq8GKQfi8A) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jcq8GKQfi8A)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U2Lfe5SLPSc&vl=en)[[3]](https://www.thecut.com/article/how-to-write-a-cover-letter.html)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-Qw6_okGPnQ&t=75)[[5]](https://odessa.libguides.com/c.php?g=1323892&p=9741993)
- **Conclusion & Call to Action:** Reiterate your interest, thank the reader, and directly ask for an interview.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jcq8GKQfi8A) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jcq8GKQfi8A)[[2]](https://www.prospects.ac.uk/careers-advice/cvs-and-cover-letters/cover-letters/)
- **Sign-off:** Use a professional closing (e.g., *Sincerely, [Your Name]*).[](https://www.careereducation.columbia.edu/resources/how-and-why-write-great-cover-letter) [[1]](https://www.careereducation.columbia.edu/resources/how-and-why-write-great-cover-letter)

2. Key Do's and Don'ts

- **DO tailor every letter:** Research the company and weave in their specific language, mission, or recent news to prove you care.
- **DO highlight measurable impacts:** Use concrete results and numbers to show the value you’ve added in previous roles.
- **DON'T write a generic template:** The "fluff test" applies here; if your paragraph could be said by any other applicant, cut it or make it more specific.
- **DON'T rehash your resume:** Let your resume outline *what* you have done; use the cover letter to tell the story of *how* and *why* you did it.[](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter) [[1]](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter)[[2]](https://nationalcareers.service.gov.uk/careers-advice/covering-letter)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U2Lfe5SLPSc&vl=en)[[4]](https://www.thecut.com/article/how-to-write-a-cover-letter.html)[[5]](https://novoresume.com/career-blog/how-to-write-a-cover-letter-guide)

3. Next Steps Review the [Indeed Cover Letter Guide](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter) for a complete breakdown, or check out [The Muse Cover Letter Tips](https://www.themuse.com/advice/how-to-write-a-cover-letter-31-tips-you-need-to-know) to explore formatting examples and additional advice.[](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter) [[1]](https://www.indeed.com/career-advice/resumes-cover-letters/how-to-write-a-cover-letter)[[2]](https://www.themuse.com/advice/how-to-write-a-cover-letter-31-tips-you-need-to-know)

items.title: Cover Letter Resources - University Career Center
items.description: Keep it short and sweet, do not exceed one page. Be persuasive and show enthusiasm. Emphasize both your hard and soft skills. Avoid To Whom it May Concern.

items.title: How do you properly write a cover letter?

expanded_element.featured_title: When writing a cover letter, you should:
expanded_element.title: How to write a cover letter - Youth Central
expanded_element.description:
introduce yourself.
mention the job (or type of job) you're applying for (or looking for)
show that your skills and experience match the skills and experience needed to do the job.
encourage the reader to read your resume.

items.title: What is an example of a cover letter?
What are the three main things needed in a cover letter?

expanded_element.title: Elements of a Cover Letter - Purdue Business
expanded_element.description:
FIRST PARAGRAPH OR INTRODUCTION: ACTS AS BASIS OR PURPOSE OF THE LETTER.
SECOND PARAGRAPH OR BODY: SUPPORTS YOUR CLAIMS FOR BEING THE RIGHT CANDIDATE FOR THIS POSITION/ORGANIZATION.
THIRD PARAGRAPH OR CLOSING: REITERATES YOUR INTEREST IN THE POSITION/ORGANIZATION.
